channel.title: _projects on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _projects on James Akl

item.title: Control simulations
item.description: Three popular control schemes are formulated and simulated. This page summarizes the main ideas, detailed treatments are in the PDFs (with accompanying Simulink implementations) linked under the section titles. Published: 2021-09-14 State Observer & Feedback Control PDF · Simulink A linear state observer is designed, specifically a Luenberger observer of the form: $$ \begin{dcases} \dot{\hat{\mathrm{x}}}=\mathrm{A} \hat{\mathrm{x}}+\mathrm{B} \mathbf{u}+\mathrm{L}(\mathbf{y}-\hat{\mathbf{y}}) \\ \hat{\mathbf{y}}=\mathrm{Cx} \end{dcases} $$ The observer gain matrix $\mathrm{L}$ is to be designed.

item.title: Convex optimization
item.description: These problems are handpicked from my projects in Convex Analysis & Optimization and Real Analysis. The solutions and proofs are my own and are linked as PDFs under the section titles. Published: 2021-09-13 Semicontinuity PDF Let $f : \R^n \to \R$ be a lower semicontinuous function, and $g : \R \to \R$ be a lower semicontinuous and nondecreasing function. Show that the function $h$ defined by $h(x) = g \circ f(x)$ is lower semicontinuous.
